Lookup Types with keyof and typeof
with indexed access types gives precise, refactor-safe types derived entirely from existing values.
Indexed access types chain — you can navigate multiple levels of nesting to retrieve the exact type at any depth without needing a separate interface declaration.
Using Indexed Access in Generic Constraints
Indexed access types shine inside generic functions — they let you constrain a parameter to a specific property's type and infer the return type precisely from the key passed in.

content: Chain indexed accesses to navigate nested types without declaring intermediate interfaces.
In generic functions, T[K] enables safe, inference-friendly property access and mutation.
Angular uses indexed access for typed form controls, NgRx selector return types, and endpoint-driven HTTP typing.
